title: Les risques du métier
writer: André Cayatte, Jean Cornec, Simone Cornec
actors: Jacques Brel, Emmanuelle Riva, René Dary
plot: Jean Doucet is a popular schoolmaster teaching in a small town in Normandy. At least he was... Until the day one of his pupils, Catherine Roussel, a garage owner's daughter, accuses him of trying to rape her. But although Doucet (...
